title: Capability
description: A single capability declaration in squad.yaml capabilities[] (Squad Protocol v5 §22)

id.description: Dotted hierarchical id with min 3 segments. E.g. media.video.analyze

description.description: What this capability does in concrete terms. Indexed by discovery.

domains.description: Canonical domains from CAPABILITY_CATALOG_V1.yaml unless squad has experimental_domains: true

schema.description: Path to JSON Schema for nested structure

tools_required.description: Semantic tool names from Squad v4 §10.7 (read, write, edit, grep, glob, bash, web_search, web_fetch) or runtime-specific names

ref.description: Path within squad to workflow/task/agent file

inputs_mapping.description: Map capability inputs to invoke target inputs

examples.description: Natural-language intents that should resolve to this capability. Used by BM25 discovery.

produces.description: Concrete deliverable types this capability outputs. Recommended kebab-case slugs (e.g. 'pdf-mobile-A6', 'instagram-carousel-1080x1350', 'logo-svg-vector', 'ebook-cover-300dpi'). Used by agentic discovery (Pass 1) for semantic match against user briefs.

example_briefs.description: Real briefs this capability resolves, in PT-BR and/or EN. Mix languages freely. Used by agentic discovery for high-fidelity semantic match.

keywords.description: Semantic synonyms (PT/EN) the brief might use to refer to this capability. Used by agentic discovery to bridge vocabulary gaps.

not_for.description: Anti-patterns. Each must mention alternative capability id when known.

score_boost.description: Discovery score multiplier. Adapter sets based on fidelity status.

estimated_cost_usd.description: Self-reported estimate per invocation. Used for budget pre-flight.

parallel_safe.description: Phase 5 (nirvana-evolution). Opt-in: when true, this capability may run concurrently with siblings in the same DAG layer. Default false → forced into its own serial layer. Authors declare true only when they audited writes_paths and handoff_to for race-freedom.

writes_paths.description: Optional declaration of memory/file paths this capability writes. Consumed by race-detector (Phase 5) to validate parallel_safe.
